headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -149.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 158% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 138 quotes including 109 at strong intensity - people are extremely agitated today with widespread venting.

• This frustration level sits in the upper portion of the 82-day range and jumped significantly from yesterday's already elevated score.

• Both fears and optimism dropped notably, with optimism hitting particularly low levels as negative sentiment takes over.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
